## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] `uv run pytest` (api)
- [ ] `npm run test` (ui)
- [ ] Manual smoke test (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in diff
- [ ] Follows existing code style
